title: aeschynomene rizzinii
intro: Aeschynomene rizzinii, also known as Rizzini's horsefly pea, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Aeschynomene rizzinii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
